overview: Union Territory-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Chandigarh.

rules.title: Review Chandigarh Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Punjab Shops and Commercial Establishments Act, as applicable to Chandigarh, is required.

citations.reference: Punjab Shops and Commercial Establishments Act as applicable to Chandigarh

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices required under applicable labour laws.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and abstracts required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with provisions governing working hours, overtime, rest intervals and weekly holidays.

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Applicability
rules.description: Verify whether any professional tax obligations apply based on the governing laws applicable to Chandigarh.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Review
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of labour law registrations, statutory records and workplace compliance.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Register
recommended.description: Maintain a digital compliance calendar for inspections, renewals and statutory due dates.
